steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content: The function is in the form $f(x)=mx+b$. In $f(x)=6x+9$, the constant term $9$ is the value of the function when $x=0$.

steps.title: Apply the time context
steps.content:
The variable $x$ represents years after the tree was first measured. So $x=0$ is the first measurement time, and:
$$f(0)=6(0)+9=9$$

steps.title: Choose the interpretation
steps.content: The value $9$ is the tree's estimated height when it was first measured. The answer is D.
